geopolitics_summary: Iran war drives EU energy cost spikes; shadow fleet sanctions tighten. Ukraine conflict spilling into Mediterranean. US pressure on EU methane rules.

themes.headline: EU doubles down on carbon tax for international flights
themes.why_it_matters: Expanding EUA-like mechanisms to aviation boosts EU carbon price floor; supports power sector merit-order switching away from coal/gas via indirect carbon cost pass-through.

themes.headline: Putin's shadow fleet faces fresh EU sanctions blitz
themes.why_it_matters: Shadow fleet sanctions restrict Russian oil exports; tightens global supply, raises Brent crude and LNG arb value. Higher energy input costs pressure EU power spreads and gas demand.

themes.headline: Iran war pushes Portugal to halve fossil fuel use over 10 years
themes.why_it_matters: Iran war triggered oil/gas cost spike; Portugal fast-tracks renewables deployment. Signals EU demand destruction and accelerated fossil fuel phase-out; bearish for power/gas prices via reduced load and coal-to-renewables switching.

themes.headline: Under US pressure, EU softens enforcement of methane regulation
themes.why_it_matters: Weakened methane enforcement allows higher Russian/non-OECD gas leakage; reduces structural cost of competing gas vs. renewables. Negative for EU power margin support from gas rationing risk.

themes.headline: NATO backs renewables as solution to energy security despite US skepticism
themes.why_it_matters: NATO endorsement of renewables as strategic energy pillar signals EU acceleration of wind/solar capex and grid integration. Structural headwind for thermal power spread margins.

watchlist: EU shadow fleet sanctions implementation timeline and scope expansion.
Portugal renewables capex announcements; wind/solar auction calendars.
US–EU methane rule coordination; import tariff escalation risk.
Iran war oil/gas supply disruption updates; LNG nomination changes.
